Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form 8interrogatories And Demand For Production Of Documents, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Pursuant To Ccp 2023.010, Et Seq.
Off Calendar Jun-20-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Elana M. Gold, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Norman King Ow
Ken
No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant Norman Ow's motion to compel further responses to the request for production of documents is moot as supplemental responses have been served. The Court makes no rulings as to the sufficiency of the responses but notes that plaintiff has failed to comply with CCP Section 2031.230. The Court finds that plaintiff failed to make a reasonable and good faith effort to informally resolve the matters in dispute. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $690 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
